title: BREAKING: Iran delivers 10-point response to US 15-point peace plan — permanent war end, no ceasefire
snippet: Iran's 10-point plan includes: 1. Guarantee Iran will not be attacked again 2. Permanent end to war, not just ceasefire 3. End to Israeli strikes in Lebanon. 998 rt, 4751 like, 428K views.

title: Trump threatens Iran: OPEN THE F****N STRAIT — living in hell if Hormuz not opened — Tuesday bridge day
snippet: Trump threatens Iran with living in hell if Strait of Hormuz not opened. Declares Tuesday as power plant and bridge day. 978 rt, 3817 like, 355K views.

title: BREAKING: Trump will hold military news conference tomorrow 1PM ET — 3 hrs after 48-hour Iran warning expires
snippet: Trump will hold military news conference tomorrow 1PM ET. 48-hour warning to Iran expires just 3 hours before. Declares Tuesday power plant and bridge day. 218 rt, 1550 like, 78.7K views.

title: BREAKING: Donald Trump rejects ceasefire he proposed to Iran
snippet: BREAKING: Donald Trump rejects ceasefire he proposed to Iran.

title: Iran rejects 45-day ceasefire proposal — wants permanent end to war, not temporary pause
snippet: Iran rejects a 45-day ceasefire proposal, saying it wants a permanent end to the war rather than a temporary pause.

title: BREAKING: Both US and Iran reject ceasefire proposal terms — Trump insists on Hormuz access
snippet: Both US and Iran reject ceasefire proposal terms. Trump insists on Hormuz free passage. (Argus Media)

title: Trump: Every bridge in Iran will be decimated by 12 o'clock tomorrow night, every power plant out of business
snippet: Trump: We have a plan where every bridge in Iran will be decimated by 12 o'clock tomorrow night, every power plant will be out of business.

title: Russia Demands US Drop Ultimatums Offers Mediation; Iran Rejects US Ceasefire Terms; US Isfahan Flop
snippet: Russia Demands US Drop Ultimatums Offers Mediation; Iran Rejects US Ceasefire Terms; US Isfahan Flop.

title: Trump: I can't talk about ceasefire — Iranians would like to make a deal
snippet: I can't talk about ceasefire. Trump says US has active willing participant on the other side. Claims Iranians would like to make a deal.

title: BBC News: Trump threatens to take out Iran in one night if no deal before Tuesday deadline
snippet: BBC News: Trump threatens to take out Iran in one night if no deal before deadline. Wants Tehran to reopen Strait of Hormuz, critical global energy route.

title: CNBC: Asia-Pacific markets open higher on mixed Iran war messaging; Trump renews civilian infrastructure threat
snippet: CNBC: Asia-Pacific markets set to open higher as investors assess mixed messaging on Iran war. Trump renewed threat to target civilian infrastructure if no peace deal in less than 24 hours.

title: US stocks whipsaw as Trump warns Iran strikes could escalate by Tuesday — casting doubt on ceasefire hopes
snippet: US stocks whipsaw as President Trump warns Iran strikes could escalate by Tuesday, casting doubt on ceasefire hopes.

title: Tensions escalate: Trump issues 48-hr ultimatum, Iran rejects ceasefire, US rescues F-15 pilots, Iran claims 3 US aircraft shot down
snippet: Tensions escalate: Trump issues 48-hr ultimatum to Iran to open Strait of Hormuz. Iran retaliates, rejects US ceasefire proposal. US recovers downed F-15 pilots. Iran claims it shot down 3 US aircraft.

title: Iran views Strait of Hormuz as crucial bargaining chip to extract concessions from Washington
snippet: Iran views the war and the Strait of Hormuz as a crucial bargaining chip that it can use to extract concessions from Washington.

title: Trump: Want to seize Iran's oil — it's there for the taking
snippet: President Trump says he wants to seize Iran's oil. It's there for the taking. There's not a thing they could do about it.

title: Fear rising: ROBO Put/Call Ratio at 1.0 — highest in at least 20 years
snippet: Fear among retail investors is rising: The ROBO Put/Call Ratio is up to 1.0, the highest in at least 20 years.

title: Gold trading volume averaged $361 billion/day in 2025 — nearly 3x 2021
snippet: Gold now trades more than most major financial assets: Average trading volume in gold averaged ~$361 billion per day in 2025, nearly 3x 2021.

title: Iran rejected proposed ceasefire — White House called lid, Trump not expected publicly rest of day
snippet: Iran rejected proposed ceasefire yesterday afternoon — White House called lid, Trump not expected publicly for rest of day.

title: Trump: Iran has destroyed US reputation — no reason to believe them, not agreeing to ceasefire
snippet: They've destroyed US reputation by attacking Iran during diplomatic negotiations on several occasions. Iran has no reason to believe them hence why they're not agreeing to a ceasefire.

title: WatcherGuru: Trump considers charging tolls for ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz
snippet: President Trump considers charging tolls for ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz.
